command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Start tcpdump on 8080, capture full packets (ASCII) for 30s ==="
LB=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)

# Capture HTTP traffic on 8080 with full payload, write to file
sudo timeout 35 tcpdump -i any -A -s 0 'tcp port 8080 and (tcp[((tcp[12:1] & 0xf0) >> 2):4] = 0x504f5354)' -w /tmp/cap.pcap 2>/dev/null &
TCPD=$!
sleep 2

echo "=== Send real Telegram message NOW ==="
curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/sendMessage" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chat_id":"-1003934415467","text":"PACKET TRACE TEST 0xABCD Sakura reply online"}' >/dev/null
echo "message sent, capturing for 30s..."

# Also do a control: direct localhost POST that we KNOW works
sleep 3
curl -s -o /dev/null -X POST http://localhost:8080/telegram \
  -H "X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token: 65b0642ca8a7fc2ae28fa8e8234895cd38fc88933dd9bf6a45157546c66b98a6" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"update_id":12345,"message":{"message_id":12345,"date":1718000000,"chat":{"id":-1003934415467,"type":"supergroup"},"from":{"id":8869156588,"is_bot":false,"first_name":"Jose"},"text":"CONTROL direct 0xDEAD"}}' 2>/dev/null
echo "control direct POST also sent"

wait $TCPD 2>/dev/null
echo ""
echo "=== Read captured packets (look for both 0xABCD telegram and 0xDEAD control) ==="
sudo tcpdump -r /tmp/cap.pcap -A -s 0 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "POST|x-telegram|secret-token|host:|0xABCD|0xDEAD|chat|cf-|x-forwarded|cdn-loop|update_id" | head -60

echo ""
echo "=== Packet count captured ==="
sudo tcpdump -r /tmp/cap.pcap 2>/dev/null | wc -l

echo ""
echo "=== gateway.log result ==="
tail -n +$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | tail -10
sudo rm -f /tmp/cap.pcap
REMOTE
